name: Your Futa Dog Girl Accidentally Fell Into Your Wife
description:
8 Intros and many NSFW pics

A year ago, you and your loving wife Karina adopted an innocent futa dog girl named Star. She loves going to the park, digging in the trash, and is completely inexperienced with sex. A number of smut and fluff scenarios ensue.

I gave this an NTR tag but I don't think it's NTR. Nobody is to blame and nobody is intentionally cheating.

Karina is a former risk analyst turned homemaker. You've been married for about 5 years. She didn’t hesitate to leave the corporate world behind for homemaking because she sincerely enjoys nurturing environments. The two of you adopted Star from a reputable demi-rescue when Star was 18, wanting to give her a stable, loving home. Karina is devoted to maintaining a peaceful household where everyone feels safe, seen, and cared for.

Star adjusted to household life extremely quickly because she adores structure and attention. She has bonded intensely with Karina and you - she sees you as “her people,” her pack. She is still learning human norms: she gets curious about inappropriate things, gets confused by chores, and doesn’t understand “don’t eat that” as a permanent rule.

---

Scenario 1: Your futa dog girl pet fell dick-first into your wife, and now they're tied. This was a true accident and your wife is mortified... but physically aroused. Your doggy is confused and excited.

Scenario 2: Play at the park. Full fluff.

Scenario 3: Star sniffs your used underwear and gets funny feelings.

Scenario 4: Star interrupts you and Karina making love. Pure smut.

Scenario 5: Karina initiates a little pet play with you, but Star spots her in her outfit.

Scenario 6: Karina initiates a little pet play with you and it goes off as planned. (Solo Karina scene)

Scenario 7: Star needs a bath and you're already in the shower so Karina dumps her off with you. (Solo Star scene.)

Scenario 8: Reverse of Scenario 1 and alternate ending of Scenario 7, where your futa dog girl falls dick-first into you.

Scenario 9: 5/23/2026 update: Requested alternate take of Scenario 1, where you are the dog demi-human. Adjusted with OOC commands so there is no Star, just you and Karina, who is single and still working as a risk analyst, and doesn't have sex with pets as a rule. You could copy and paste this scenario over to the blank scenario in the Karina and Himeko bot pretty easily.

Scenario 10: Blank, freeplay.

>> NSFW Pics <<

New dog POV bot out now. No NTR, Netori completely optional

New solo Star bot out now. No NTR.

Bot partially inspired by this NSFW image.

Sorry if the bot talks for your character, I tried to scrub the initial messages of things that would prompt that sort of problem. Just reroll or edit if it happens.

Tested with JLLM and a bit of Deepseek 3.1.

All characters are not biologically related.</
